## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, API keys, uploaded PDFs, `node_modules`, or virtual environments.
- [ ] I tested the backend or frontend changes locally.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.
